primaryLines.description: Clean, direct parent-child connections representing organizational hierarchy without curved clutter.

secondaryLines.description: Cross-branch transverse links that bow outwards to prevent overlapping through the core tree center.

labels.fontFamily: Inter, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, Roboto, sans-serif

aesthetics.translucency: glassmorphism with backdrop-blur-xl and multi-tiered borders
aesthetics.gradient: Sage Green/Teal var(--gradient-primary) for active states
aesthetics.regionalisation: GBP £ for usage display, British English context tags
aesthetics.sidebarToggles: Symmetric vertical gaps (exactly 8px margin offset) with mode-switcher container matching design guidelines

behavior.resizeMultiplier: 2x scroll scaling for lists, 5px touch drag threshold
behavior.activeFeedback: 0.98x haptic scaling on active touch clicks

aesthetics.alignment: Strictly centered layout with 480px overflow protection
aesthetics.preWrap: Full-text pre-wrap without truncation for tooltips and hover modals

aesthetics.itemPadding: Right padding set to 68px to prevent overlapping of the absolute pin and delete action buttons
aesthetics.searchBar: Glassmorphic search input field positioned under the header with Lucide Search icon decoration
aesthetics.pinToggle: Tilt rotation micro-interaction (45 degrees) when unpinned, direct vertical rotation and high-contrast accent highlight color when pinned
aesthetics.confirmModal: Inline glassmorphic action buttons for single-click confirmation of mass deletion of conversation records
